name: io.github.Khamel83/argus
title: Argus Retrieval
description: Retrieval platform for AI agents: multi-provider search, dead-article recovery, site capture, local docs-plus-research packs, and budget-aware routing.

environmentVariables.name: ARGUS_WOLFRAM_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: WolframAlpha App ID (2,000 free computed-answer queries/month)

environmentVariables.name: ARGUS_BRAVE_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Brave Search API key (2,000 free queries/month)

environmentVariables.name: ARGUS_SERPER_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Serper API key (2,500 one-time free queries)

environmentVariables.name: ARGUS_DATA_ROOT
environmentVariables.description: Optional override for the writable Argus runtime corpus root
